name: sso-oidc-system
description: Secure Single Sign-On (SSO) System via OpenID Connect (OIDC)

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix idp && npm install --prefix elms && npm install --prefix typesprint && npm install --prefix evalhub
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix idp" "npm run dev --prefix elms" "npm run dev --prefix typesprint" "npm run dev --prefix evalhub"
